import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

target\_url = "https://www.example.com" # Replace with the target URL of the website you want to scrape

response = requests.get(target\_url)
soup = BeautifulSoup(response.content, "html.parser")

# Find and extract the desired information from the HTML content
username\_input = soup.find("input", {"name": "username"})
password\_input = soup.find("input", {"name": "password"})

# Store the extracted information in variables for further use
username = username\_input["value"]
password = password\_input["value"]
